themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Thus saith the LORD of hosts; If thou wilt walk in my ways, and if thou wilt keep my charge,...".
